Figure 7: Comparison of the reference and offline multiscale solutions in Case 1 with coarse mesh size H = 1/40 and six oversampling layers. (a)–(c): first component; (d)–(f): second component. In each row, the left panel shows the reference solution, the center panel shows the multiscale solution obtained using the constraint multiscale basis, and the right panel shows the multiscale solution obtained using the relaxed multiscale basis.
